overview: Revival Med Centers provides testosterone replacement therapy for men and hormone replacement therapy for women, along with weight loss programs featuring GLP-1 and other wellness services. Treatment is delivered through personalized care plans combining advanced medical technology with functional and Western medicine approaches.
highlights: Customized bioidentical hormone therapy based on patient biochemistry
IV therapy and vitamin booster shots
targetAudience: Men aged 35 and older seeking testosterone optimization, women experiencing menopause, and individuals pursuing weight loss and metabolic health.
